segments.text: When Jesus came down from the mountain, large crowds followed Him.
Suddenly a leper[^49] came and knelt before Him, saying,
Lord, if You are willing, You can make me clean.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Jesus reached out His hand and touched the man.
I am willing,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He said.
Be clean!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And immediately his leprosy was cleansed.
Then Jesus instructed him,
See that you don’t tell anyone. But go, show yourself to the priest and offer the gift prescribed by Moses, as a testimony to them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When Jesus had entered Capernaum, a centurion came and pleaded with Him,
Lord, my servant[^51] lies at home, paralyzed and in terrible agony.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I will go and heal him,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus replied.
The centurion answered,
Lord, I am not worthy to have You come under my roof. But just say the word, and my servant will be healed.
segments.speaker: The centurion

segments.text: For I myself am a man under authority, with soldiers under me. I tell one to go, and he goes; and another to come, and he comes. I tell my servant to do something, and he does it.
segments.speaker: The centurion

segments.text: When Jesus heard this, He marveled and said to those following Him,
Truly I tell you, I have not found anyone in Israel with such great faith.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I say to you that many will come from the east and the west to share the banquet with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob in the kingdom of heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But the sons of the kingdom will be thrown into the outer darkness, where there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then Jesus said to the centurion,
Go! As you have believed, so will it be done for you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And his servant was healed at that very hour.
When Jesus arrived at Peter’s house, He saw Peter’s mother-in-law sick in bed with a fever.
So He touched her hand, and the fever left her, and she got up and began to serve them.
When evening came, many who were demon-possessed were brought to Jesus, and He drove out the spirits with a word and healed all the sick.
This was to fulfill what was spoken through the prophet Isaiah:
He took on our infirmities and carried our diseases.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When Jesus saw a large crowd around Him, He gave orders to cross to the other side of the sea.[^53]
And one of the scribes came to Him and said,
Teacher, I will follow You wherever You go.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus replied,
Foxes have dens and birds of the air have nests, but the Son of Man has no place to lay His head.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Another of His disciples requested,
Lord, first let me go and bury my father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But Jesus told him,
Follow Me, and let the dead bury their own dead.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When He got into the boat, His disciples followed Him.
Suddenly a violent storm came up on the sea, so that the boat was engulfed by the waves; but Jesus was sleeping.
The disciples went and woke Him, saying,
Lord, save us! We are perishing!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You of little faith,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus replied,
why are you so afraid?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then He got up and rebuked the winds and the sea, and it was perfectly calm.
The men were amazed and asked,
What kind of man is this? Even the winds and the sea obey Him!
segments.speaker: The men were amazed and

segments.text: When Jesus arrived on the other side in the region of the Gadarenes,[^54] He was met by two demon-possessed men coming from the tombs. They were so violent that no one could pass that way.
What do You want with us, Son of God?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: they shouted.
Have You come here to torture us before the appointed time?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: In the distance a large herd of pigs was feeding.
So the demons begged Jesus,
If You drive us out, send us into the herd of pigs.
segments.speaker: The demons

segments.text: Go!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He told them. So they came out and went into the pigs, and the whole herd rushed down the steep bank into the sea and died in the waters.
Those tending the pigs ran off into the town and reported all this, including the account of the demon-possessed men.
Then the whole town went out to meet Jesus. And when they saw Him, they begged Him to leave their region.
